news.t: ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'

overview.description: The State Street DoubleLine Short Duration Total Return Tactical ETF (STOT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed and has broad capabilities to invest in short duration investment grade and high-yield fixed income securities. STOT was launched on Apr 13, 2016 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'
data.text: Hello! In this week's ETF Wrap, you'll get a look at flow data showing recent “bullish buying behavior” from investors, as well as funds to consider before 2024 hits.
